description: Address 6 issues from semantic review: timeout persistence, tracking status gate, idempotency guard, requireInteraction conditional, remove as-never casts, userId null guard
steps: 1. Fix issue 1: Add customerUnavailableTimeout: 300 to the Prisma update in app/api/delivery/unavailable/route.ts
2. Fix issue 2: Update status check in app/api/orders/[id]/tracking/route.ts to include ARRIVING and CUSTOMER_UNAVAILABLE statuses
3. Fix issue 3: Add idempotency check in app/api/delivery/unavailable/route.ts - if order is already CUSTOMER_UNAVAILABLE, return success
4. Fix issue 4: Change requireInteraction in public/sw.js from hardcoded true to payload.requireInteraction !== false
5. Fix issue 5: Remove as never casts in both unavailable endpoints
6. Fix issue 6: Add null guard for order.userId before calling sendPushToUser in both endpoints
acceptance_criteria: customerUnavailableTimeout is persisted in the database update
Tracking route shows delivery partner location for ARRIVING and CUSTOMER_UNAVAILABLE statuses
Repeat call to unavailable endpoint returns idempotent success instead of misleading 404
requireInteraction defaults to true but allows payload opt-out
No as never casts remain in the unavailable endpoints
sendPushToUser is only called when order.userId is truthy
verification: Run npx prisma generate to confirm schema compiles
Run npx next build to confirm no TypeScript/build errors
findings: All 6 review issues resolved. prisma generate and next build pass cleanly. 37/38 tests pass (same pre-existing scroll-preservation.test.ts failure as before, unrelated to changes).
